_comment: The learnable decisions (Beta/Thompson bandits). Each ACTS only when its gauge fills (observations >= threshold); below that it OBSERVES (returns control) so we never act on noise. Thresholds are deliberately conservative for a low-traffic start. Wire ACT into the build/site once green; learner_engine updates the posteriors in 11_models/posteriors.

learners.name: source-weighting
learners.note: Fed by verify-events outcomes; needs NO user traffic. First to go live.

learners.name: feature-selection
learners.note: Which events get the hero / 'worth a trip' / featured slots.

learners.name: cta-copy
learners.control: The week in world art, once a week. Free.
